name: compliance-support
description: A single-plugin marketplace for Compliance Support, a data-protection gate for PCI cardholder-data code.

plugins.name: compliance-support
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin for engineers who write PCI cardholder-data code. It blocks hardcoded secrets and weak crypto as the code is written, and reviews changed code for PII in logs and money-moving actions with no audit trail when the turn ends.
